summary: Fixes the window header layout that broke in v0.3.13.

fixed: Sidebar and toolbar no longer draw under the macOS traffic lights
Restores the compact single-line toolbar status badge from v0.3.12 — the multi-line badge added in v0.3.13 broke unified toolbar layout
Toolbar moved to the split view level so both sidebar and detail panes respect title bar spacing
Window chrome disables full-size content view so content stays below the title bar
changed: Hover the toolbar status badge to see per-account unread breakdown in a tooltip
